title: PackInstance
description: Records the delivered state of a ClusterPack on a target cluster. Created by the PackExecutionReconciler after a successful pack-deploy job. One PackInstance per logical pack per target cluster. wrapper-schema.md §3.

spec.description: PackInstance specification. Written once at creation by the PackExecutionReconciler.

clusterPackRef.description: Name of the ClusterPack CR that was delivered.

version.description: Semantic version of the ClusterPack that was delivered. Copied from ClusterPack.spec.version at creation time.

targetClusterRef.description: Name of the TalosCluster to which this pack was delivered.

dependsOn.description: Names of PackInstance CRs that this instance depends on.

dependencyPolicy.description: Behavior when a declared dependency PackInstance reports drift.

onDrift.description: Policy when a dependency reports Drifted=True. Default: Warn.

status.description: PackInstance runtime status. Written by the PackInstanceReconciler and conductor drift loop.

deliveredAt.description: Timestamp when the pack was last confirmed delivered.

driftSummary.description: Human-readable summary of current drift state.

deployedResources.description: List of Kubernetes resources applied by the pack-deploy job for this PackInstance. Written by PackExecutionReconciler on success. Used by the PackInstance deletion handler to clean up deployed workload on ClusterPack deletion. Schema-first per Decision 11.

namespace.description: Namespace of the resource. Empty for cluster-scoped resources.
